name: RiFlex 360 Capsule
description: RiFlex 360 Capsule is an advanced joint health formulation combining Turmacin® Turmeric Extract, Tart Cherry extract, and French Pine Bark Extract. Traditionally used for relieving joint pain and symptoms of osteoarthritis.
benefits: Reduce knee joint pain in 3 to 7 days

dosage.therapeutic: 2 capsules twice daily after meal for severe joint pain or osteoarthritis
dosage.maintenance: 2 capsules once daily after meal for mild joint pain

who_can_consume: People with joint pain, individuals with osteoarthritis, those with gout, athletes experiencing post-exercise muscle and joint pain.
who_cannot_consume: Not specified. Consult a healthcare professional if pregnant, nursing, or on blood-thinning medication.

qa.question: How quickly can I expect to see results with RiFlex 360?
qa.answer: Clinical studies show that Turmacin® can reduce knee joint pain in 3 to 7 days. In one study, after just 3 days, it effectively reduced pain when walking on flat surface, going up/down stairs, sitting or lying, and at night while in bed.

qa.question: What is the difference between mild and severe dosage?
qa.answer: For mild joint pain, take 2 capsules once daily after meal. For severe joint pain or osteoarthritis, take 2 capsules twice daily after meal for optimal relief.
